subject: Real NASA Earth textures loaded
body:
Replaced procedural Earth with real NASA satellite imagery:

🌍 Textures downloaded:
- earth_color_8k.jpg (5400x2700) — NASA Blue Marble topo+bathymetry
- earth_clouds_2k.jpg (2048x1024) — cloud map from Solar System Scope
- earth_topo_2k.jpg (2048x1024) — daymap texture (backup)

🔧 Globe.ts rewritten:
- Loads real textures via TextureLoader
- Auto-generates roughness map from color (ocean detection)
- Async loading with placeholder fallback
- Proper sRGB color space

The Earth now looks like... Earth! Real continents, oceans, ice caps.

Build: TypeScript clean, Vite 528KB
